topic: While DC debated export controls, China shipped Kimi K3 — a 2.8T-param open-weights frontier model. The US AI lead is no longer a fact.
prompt: A single massive ancient fortress wall split down the center by a jagged crack, blazing deep-amber light pouring through the breach, rough stone at the crack edge lined with glowing neural-network filaments, deep black void background, dramatic low-angle hero shot, 35mm cinematic photography, photorealistic editorial, bold contrast
alt_text: A colossal ancient fortress wall split by a jagged crack with blazing amber light pouring through; neural-network filaments glow along the fracture against a dark void.
